args_schema.description: Overrides args_schema. Omit to keep prior value.

compiled_js.description: Updated bundle output. Required when `source` or `edits` are supplied.

description.description: Overrides the prior description. Omit to keep the prior value.

edits.description: Structured edits against the current source.

old.description: Text to locate (must match exactly once).

requires_secrets.description: Overrides requires_secrets. Omit to keep prior value.

returns_schema.description: Overrides returns_schema. Omit to keep prior value.

source.description: Full new TypeScript source. Mutually exclusive with `edits`.
